pos_sentences.text: i like library wich is placed in my college the library is very big and provide good books for students.
pos_sentences.name: Nakka Priya

pos_sentences.text: i like the funcyion in my college its like festivals
pos_sentences.name: Nakka Priya

pos_sentences.text: I like the infrastructure of the college and it is surrounded by lots of plants which keep the surroundings peacefully and we can get good ventilation.
pos_sentences.name: Hari Haran

pos_sentences.text: The staff also provide good teaching and clarify each and every student doubts and all the staff are PhD holders and some of them have doctorate and all the staff are well experienced.
pos_sentences.name: Hari Haran

pos_sentences.text: We have good library with lot of books other then subject knowledge they provide magazines daily newspapers and extra things to gain extra knowledge with helps students so much and we have good labs with wifi connection.
pos_sentences.name: Hari Haran

pos_sentences.text: The environment is good and so peaceful.
pos_sentences.name: Rajesh

pos_sentences.text: I liked the infrastructure of the laboratory, and the Library that is present in the main block.
pos_sentences.name: Meghana B

pos_sentences.text: Very well equipped laboratories and good infra. Structure
pos_sentences.name: Lehana menati

pos_sentences.text: The interaction with students in studies was too good.
pos_sentences.name: Puthalapattu Saichandu

pos_sentences.text: We had a best mechanical labs in my college& I always cherished that best gang I have.
pos_sentences.name: Puthalapattu Saichandu

neg_sentences.text: in my college the playground is small thats we are not feel to play comfortablly
neg_sentences.name: Nakka Priya

neg_sentences.text: Must maintain proper dress code. Always wanna wear formal dress and shoes.
neg_sentences.name: Hari Haran

neg_sentences.text: I disliked the quality of the education that is provided, but it is a challenge to every student, that helps them improve
neg_sentences.name: Meghana B

neg_sentences.text: their less playing times in my campus, i think 1st year 1 period only going to games
neg_sentences.name: Y HEMA SAI

neg_sentences.text: out goings thier want more permission like parent,faculty , class teacher,hod of our department hostel warden with parents permmision.
neg_sentences.name: Y HEMA SAI

neg_sentences.text: There is no playground.that makes me that college is waste.
neg_sentences.name: Venu madhav

neg_sentences.text: Auditorium is not that much Bigger,  it must be Bigger like other colleges
neg_sentences.name: K Hemanth

neg_sentences.text: Indoor stadium is not there,  It must be there in future
neg_sentences.name: K Hemanth

neg_sentences.text: Things that i dislikes is the placements which gives only prior to toppers
neg_sentences.name: V vamsi

neg_sentences.text: Library doesn't have enough collections of books
neg_sentences.name: V vamsi
